blended.narrative: Montana Snowbowl is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 3,333 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 47°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Friday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 4.4" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 68".
